response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'X.U.' and the credited composers 'Benjamin, mpi' and 'Hiroyuki Sawano' from on-screen text at 00:50. The performers are IRyS and Hakos Baelz. The song language is English. Performed search with query: '"X.U." Hiroyuki Sawano English lyrics'. Extracted lyrics from reputable lyrics sites found in search results.
response.global_summary: A virtual stage performance of the song 'X.U.' from 'Seraph of the End', performed by Hololive English talents IRyS and Hakos Baelz.

scenes.description: Instrumental introduction to the virtual stage.
IRyS and Hakos Baelz perform 'X.U.' on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I don't want nobody to get killed
I'll come and get you
I am always ready to fight
So don't take all of the blame
We will fight
Oh, wait
Don't take all of the way you always do
There will always be something you cannot control
We will overcome
Your salvation has begun
No signs, no lights
Such a mess all over
Don't kill your hopes
You make me realize who I need
I'll be there
Hold on
They'll change it somehow
So where are you now?
I'll reach you by dawn
Before you can be turned
Illusions are torn
The fallen angels you run with don't know
It is our pain that makes us all human after all
One more baby, a photograph show
Our fragile precious world
Must protect it, respond to the call
